---
title: "A | Thema 4"
format: live-html
engine: knitr  
status: "Version 0.1"
lang: de 
---

{{< include _extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
 
## Messinvarianz über Gruppen

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

webr::install("quadprog",  repos = "https://kroehne.github.io/webr-quadprog-repo")
 
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(mnormt))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaan))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaanPlot))  
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(psych))  
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(DT))

assignInNamespace("lav_options_checkinterval", function(x, nm, num2int) {
    if (any(is.na(x))) return(TRUE)
    if (num2int) x <- as.integer(x)                                                                                              
    oks <- vapply(x, function(x1) {
      (x1 > nm$bounds[1] || (x1 == nm$bounds[1] && nm$first.in)) &&                                                              
      (x1 < nm$bounds[2] || (x1 == nm$bounds[2] && nm$last.in))                                                                  
    }, TRUE)
    all(oks)                                                                                                                     
  }, ns = "lavaan")
 
View <- function(dat){
  dat_name <- deparse(substitute(dat))
  df_display <- dat |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "❌ (NA)", .x))
  )
  
  DT::datatable(
    df_display,
    rownames = FALSE, 
    options = list(
      pageLength = 5,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      dom = 'tip',   
      columnDefs = list(list(className = 'dt-center', targets = "_all"))
    ),
    caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
      style = 'caption-side: top; text-align: left;',
      'data.frame: ', htmltools::strong(dat_name)
    )
  )  
}
```

### Präsentation

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
# ============================================================================
# Thema 04: Messinvarianz über Gruppen
# Datensatz: psych::bfi (N=2800, Big Five, Variable gender)
# ============================================================================

library(lavaan)
library(semTools) 

data(bfi, package = "psych")
dat <- bfi[complete.cases(bfi[, c(paste0("E", 1:5), "gender")]), ]
dat$gender <- factor(dat$gender, labels = c("Männer", "Frauen"))

# Items E1 und E2 sind negativ gepolt → umpolen
dat$E1r <- 7 - dat$E1
dat$E2r <- 7 - dat$E2

# ---- PRÄSENTATION: MI für Extraversion (E1r, E2r, E3, E4, E5) ----

model_E <- 'Extraversion =~ E1r + E2r + E3 + E4 + E5'

# Stufe 1: Konfigural
fit_conf <- cfa(model_E, data = dat, group = "gender")

# Stufe 2: Metrisch (gleiche Ladungen)
fit_metr <- cfa(model_E, data = dat, group = "gender",
                group.equal = "loadings")

# Stufe 3: Skalar (gleiche Ladungen + Intercepts)
fit_scal <- cfa(model_E, data = dat, group = "gender",
                group.equal = c("loadings", "intercepts"))

# Stufe 4: Strikt (gleiche Ladungen + Intercepts + Residualvarianzen)
fit_stri <- cfa(model_E, data = dat, group = "gender",
                group.equal = c("loadings", "intercepts", "residuals"))

# Vergleichstabelle
mi_fits <- list(Konfigural = fit_conf, Metrisch = fit_metr,
                Skalar = fit_scal, Strikt = fit_stri)

mi_table <- sapply(mi_fits, function(f) {
  fitMeasures(f, c("chisq", "df", "pvalue", "cfi", "rmsea", "srmr"))
})
round(t(mi_table), 3)

# Delta-CFI und Delta-RMSEA
cfis <- sapply(mi_fits, function(f) fitMeasures(f, "cfi"))
rmseas <- sapply(mi_fits, function(f) fitMeasures(f, "rmsea"))
data.frame(Stufe = names(mi_fits),
           CFI = round(cfis, 4),
           Delta_CFI = c(NA, round(diff(cfis), 4)),
           RMSEA = round(rmseas, 4),
           Delta_RMSEA = c(NA, round(diff(rmseas), 4)))

# Chi-Quadrat-Differenztests
anova(fit_conf, fit_metr)
anova(fit_metr, fit_scal)
anova(fit_scal, fit_stri)
```

## Bericht

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true 
# ---- BERICHT: MI für alle 5 Big-Five-Faktoren ----

# Umpolen aller nötigen Items
dat$A1r <- 7 - dat$A1
dat$C4r <- 7 - dat$C4; dat$C5r <- 7 - dat$C5
dat$N1r <- dat$N1; dat$N2r <- dat$N2  # N-Items nicht umpolen (sind "richtig" gepolt)
dat$O2r <- 7 - dat$O2; dat$O5r <- 7 - dat$O5

models <- list(
  Agreeableness     = 'A =~ A1r + A2 + A3 + A4 + A5',
  Conscientiousness = 'C =~ C1 + C2 + C3 + C4r + C5r',
  Extraversion      = 'E =~ E1r + E2r + E3 + E4 + E5',
  Neuroticism       = 'N =~ N1 + N2 + N3 + N4 + N5',
  Openness          = 'O =~ O1 + O2r + O3 + O4 + O5r'
)

mi_results <- list()
for (trait in names(models)) {
  cat("\n===", trait, "===\n")
  dat_trait <- dat[complete.cases(dat[, all.vars(as.formula(paste("~", gsub(".*=~", "", models[[trait]]))))]), ]

  fc <- cfa(models[[trait]], data = dat_trait, group = "gender")
  fm <- cfa(models[[trait]], data = dat_trait, group = "gender",
            group.equal = "loadings")
  fs <- cfa(models[[trait]], data = dat_trait, group = "gender",
            group.equal = c("loadings", "intercepts"))

  cfis_t <- c(fitMeasures(fc, "cfi"), fitMeasures(fm, "cfi"), fitMeasures(fs, "cfi"))
  cat("CFI (konf/metr/skal):", round(cfis_t, 4), "\n")
  cat("Delta-CFI (metr, skal):", round(diff(cfis_t), 4), "\n")

  mi_results[[trait]] <- list(konfigural = fc, metrisch = fm, skalar = fs)
}

```
